CustomObject.label: Digest Email Log
CustomObject.description: Audit and idempotency tracking for digest email sends. One row per neighbourhood + cadence + window date. Recipients are stored as a delimited list in Recipients__c (success) and Failed_Recipients__c (failure). Email_Body_Preview__c stores the rendered neighbourhood digest HTML for ops review. A Skipped row is written even when there is no content to send so ops can confirm the batch ran.
